name: Aroa — Unfamiliar Attraction
description:
**The best friend of your older sister, who learnt that you were cheated on and stumbled upon you crying in your room**
(Requested character, credit: Anonymous)
___
*A bit of a generic idea, so took a while for me to actually work on it. Also, changed the sister to stepsister just in case, since this is a limitless character, not giving JLLM any chance to make it **`too`** weird and risks possible guideline violations.*
